event: biopsy specimens confirmed disseminated peritoneal adenomucinosis (DPAM)
advised to undergo peritonectomy and bilateral oophorectomy
referred for consultation on fertility preservation options
underwent IVF and embryo cryopreservation procedures
18 embryos fertilized with donor sperm and cryopreserved
extended spread of the disease found
parietal peritoneum resected omentectomy appendectomy splenectomy and bilateral adnexectomy performed
postoperative heated intraperitoneal infusions of mitomycin C
pigtail inserted into the left ureter
blood creatinine level returned to normal
